lines.speaker: Andiess Juip
lines.text: I'm helpin' ta protect the base camp. How about you, what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I'm trying to help out around here.

lines.speaker: Andiess Juip
lines.text: Good, we can always use extra help. Just make sure you don't go getting into any trouble or you'll have me to deal with!
